title: Dolichos grahamianus
taxonomy: Dolichos grahamianus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae. Dolichos grahamianus is a member of the genus Dolichos, which consists of about 30 species of climbing or scrambling plants native to tropical Africa. The plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in Kenya, and has been identified to be a climber. Dolichos grahamianus is also known to be a herbaceous plant that has been used in traditional medicine.
